attempts.strategy: Build Ring.ord_ringEquiv: R-linear equivalence R/(x) ≃ₗ[R] S/(e x) + LinearEquiv.length_eq + Module.length_eq_of_surjective.

attempts.insight: R-side equivalence-of-quotients lifts to length equality; surjective algebra-map closes the R-vs-S length bridge.

attempts.strategy: Build Ring.nonZeroDivisors_ringEquiv via MulEquivClass.map_nonZeroDivisors + injectivity chase.
attempts.goal_before: r ∈ nonZeroDivisors R ↔ e r ∈ nonZeroDivisors S
attempts.insight: Mathlib's MulEquivClass.map_nonZeroDivisors collapses both directions in one step.

attempts.strategy: Build Ring.ordMonoidWithZeroHom_ringEquiv by unfolding ordMonoidWithZeroHom and by_cases on r ∈ nzd R.

attempts.insight: Direct case-split on nzd membership; both branches reduce to ord_ringEquiv after the equiv-image rewrite.

attempts.insight: Ring.ordFrac_eq_div is the key reduction; once both sides become quotients of ordMonoidWithZeroHom, the equiv-image lemma trio collapses the comparison. HARD BAR met.

attempts.insight: Elementary-matrix linear map: sends Pi.single j 1 ↦ Pi.single i 1 and other basis vectors to 0; thin composition of Mathlib primitives, axiom-clean.

attempts.strategy: Build Module.elemMap_apply via toSpanSingleton_apply + Pi.single case-split.
Build Module.linearMap_finFunR_matrix_decomp: A = ∑_{(i,j)} A(Pi.single j 1) i • elemMap n m i j; this is the core matrix decomposition.
attempts.code_tried: Decompose x = ∑_j (x j) • Pi.single j 1; push through A via map_sum + map_smul; express each row A(Pi.single j 1) = ∑_i (A(Pi.single j 1) i) • Pi.single i 1; reshuffle via Finset.sum_product_right; close via LinearMap.smul_apply + elemMap_apply.
attempts.lean_error: Multiple lean_run_code rounds: 'failed to synthesize AddCommMonoid (Fin m)' (1 attempt), 'rewrite did not find pattern' (3 attempts), 'show is not definitionally equal' (1 attempt). Resolved by reordering basis-decomposition vs. sum reshuffling.

attempts.insight: Sum reshuffling via Finset.sum_product_right is the load-bearing step; the inner basis decomposition has to be done BEFORE the outer reshuffle, not after.
